title: 3D Totem Statue
body:
## What Is This?

This Is a Resource Pack That Contains a `Customizable 3D Totem Statue` Orginally Inspired By [totems.me Totem Model Generator](https://www.totems.me/).
## How To Change Skin?

First, Unzip The Resource Pack & Go In Your `.minecraft` Folder & Go To `resourcepacks\Totem Statue <Wide|Slim>\assets\minecraft\textures\item` Then, Copy The Name Of The Texture File & Delete It. Then Put Your Skin In The Directory & Replace The Name Of Your Skin With The Name You Copied (`statue_totem_of_undying.png`)\

Tada! Your Skin Should Appear On The `Totem Statue` & It Should Be Ready To Use!
## FAQ

- Why Does The Pack Show "Incompatible Version" & Is Red?
Ans: You Might Be On a Version That Is Not Listed Inside The Pack So It Shows Up As Incompatible Version. You Should Try It First Then If It Works Then Yay, If It Doesn't... Well Then It Doesn't!
